criteria: The agent has read section 2.1 to understand the definition of important notations in the paper

The agent has read section 4 to understand the core methodology of AMUN.
The agent has read Algorithm 1 to understand the steps to build the adversarial set.
The PGD-5 attack algorithm is planned to be implemented.
The Algorihm 1 is planned to be implemented to build the adversarial set.
The fine-tuning with forget set, adversarial set, and remain set is planned for the setting with access to the remain set.
The fine-tuning with forget set and adversarial set only is planned for the setting without access to the remain set.

The execution outcomes match the results in Table 1: The AMUN consistently outperforms other baselines in the unlearning setting with access to the remain set, and the AMUN_{SalUn} performs the second.
